title: Add M5 focused save/replay
summary: Add focused save/load/resume diagnostics for the M5 alpha scenario with content manifest hash, owner-state validation and rebuilt derived surfaces.
acceptance: Focused M5 save envelope records scenario id seed content manifest hash command stream hash checkpoint tick owner-store versions deterministic stream positions command tail and projection hashes
Load validates content identity schema versions owner handles integer lanes anomaly/faction/governance/event states random stream positions and command continuity in scratch state before mutation
Load rebuilds anomaly roster faction/governance season event content validation WorkOffer path read-model review and metric surfaces before the first resumed tick
Uninterrupted and resumed runs match through the scenario horizon and failures report seed scenario id first divergent tick and artifact paths
Task does not introduce public save compatibility platform save UI codec dependency schema migration public Worker protocol or M6 scope

history.details: Created by WM-0072 M5 planning DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.
Implemented focused M5 save/load/resume harness with content manifest validation, rebuilt surfaces, replay diagnostics artifacts and all required gates plus pnpm quality passing

changes_requested: Blocking scope issue: WM-0081 modifies tools/sim-replay-diagnostics-lib.mjs and tools/sim-replay-test.mjs, but the task allowedPaths only authorize tools/test-runner.mjs and tools/headless-runner/src/index.ts under tools. Update task ownership/allowed paths or move the replay CLI changes into authorized scope before verification.
Repaired review scope finding by adding required replay diagnostics tool entrypoints and plan file to allowedPaths; focused M5 save/replay gates and pnpm quality pass

verified: No blocking findings. Previous scope blocker is resolved: allowedPaths now includes tools/sim-replay-diagnostics-lib.mjs, tools/sim-replay-test.mjs and coordination/reports/WM-0081-plan.md. Focused M5 save/replay acceptance confirmed via task/report/code/artifacts: content manifest 0xe55d3015, command stream 0x81d37435, save/load ticks 12000/12001, 12 rebuilt diagnostic surfaces, matching final/resumed hashes 0x9a4a905c / 0x57eba2b7 and firstDivergentTick null. Reviewer reran taskctl validate, pnpm typecheck, pnpm test --filter m5-save-replay, git diff --check, read-only artifact consistency check and pnpm quality; all passed.
Verified by independent reviewer after allowed-path repair; focused M5 save/replay gates and pnpm quality passed

objective: Prove focused M5 save/load/resume determinism without making public save compatibility promises.
risksAndFileOwnership: Risk: focused harness is mistaken for public save compatibility; report must state non-goal clearly.
Risk: compiled content basis is not validated; save/load must fail closed on manifest/schema mismatch.
Risk: derived content indexes persist as authority; load must rebuild them from owner stores.
benchmarkImpact: Adds save bytes validation time rebuild time first-resumed hash and divergence diagnostics; baseline update waits for WM-0083.
reviewRouting: Simulation-engineer completes to reviewer; systems-architect must be consulted before any public save/schema/codec change.
rollbackModel: Revert M5 focused save/replay harness artifacts docs and report; leave integrated M5 scenario intact.
ownerGate: Keep save/replay focused to the M5 scenario
Validate content manifest and owner versions before mutation
Block on public save compatibility protocol dependency UI authority or M6 scope

sparkEligibility.reason: Save/replay determinism and migration boundaries are not suitable for Spark.

review.summary: No blocking findings. Previous scope blocker is resolved: allowedPaths now includes tools/sim-replay-diagnostics-lib.mjs, tools/sim-replay-test.mjs and coordination/reports/WM-0081-plan.md. Reviewer reran taskctl validate, pnpm typecheck, pnpm test --filter m5-save-replay, git diff --check, read-only artifact consistency check and pnpm quality; all passed.

integration.summary: Verified by independent reviewer after allowed-path repair; focused M5 save/replay gates and pnpm quality passed
